allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('postcss:', d.get\('dependencies', {}\).get\('postcss', 'not found'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\).get\('postcss', 'not found'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; versions=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in versions if v.startswith\('4.'\)][-5:]\)")
